Name: Name
Clean customer forms with image upload,: Clean customer forms with image upload, identity, and license details.
Hint Customer Arabic Name: Enter the full Arabic name exactly as shown in the official ID.
Hint Customer English Name: Optional, but it is best to match the English name in official documents.
Hint Customer Email: Optional, but use a valid email for communication and notifications.
Hint Primary Mobile Number: This is the main mobile number used for contact and bookings.
Hint Secondary Mobile Number: Optional, add it if the customer has an alternative number.
Hint Third Mobile Number: Optional, add it only if the customer uses more than one extra number.
Hint Identity Number: Enter the ID or residency number exactly as written.
Hint Driving License Number: Enter the driving license number as shown on the license.
Hint Identity Issue Date: Choose the identity issue date from the official document.
Hint License Expiry Date: Choose the driving license expiry date in Gregorian format.
Hint License Hijri Date: Enter the Hijri license date if your workflow requires it.
Hint Nationality: Enter the customer's nationality exactly as shown in official documents.
Hint Date of Birth: Optional, but useful for complete customer records.
Hint Identity Issue Place: Enter the city or authority that issued the identity document.
Hint License Issue Place: Enter the city or authority that issued the driving license.
Hint Subscription ID: Enter the subscription ID linked to this customer in the system.
Hint Tax Record: Optional, use it when the customer has a tax registration number.
Example Address: Example: Riyadh, Al Yasmin District, Olaya Street
Hint Address: Enter a clear address that helps with contact and documentation.
Example Customer Notes: Example: Prefer WhatsApp contact after 5 PM.
Hint Customer Notes: Write any important operational notes about the customer.
Hint Customer Image: Upload a clear JPG or PNG customer image if required.
Customer Arabic name is required and mus: Customer Arabic name is required and must contain Arabic characters only.
English name must contain English letter: English name must contain English letters only.
Primary mobile number is required and mu: Primary mobile number is required and must be a valid Saudi number.
Identity number is required and must be: Identity number is required and must be valid.
Driving license number is required and m: Driving license number is required and must be valid.
